lines.text: Central Perk. Charlie, Joey and Rachel are on the couches

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: (while Joey's giving her a massage) Oh! That feels sooo good!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (speaking to herself and reading Cosmopolitan) Oh, lucky me! Coffee and a live sex show!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: I'm sorry, what?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh... Oh, I'm sorry! I'm not... I was just-I was just reading to Emma.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: From... Cosmo??

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, yeah... It's... "climax your way to better skin".

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: (to Joey) So, I have to go shopping today, which is my least favourite thing, I'm soo bad at picking out clothes!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So you need someone who knows fashion, to tell you what looks good.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (hiding herself behind the magazine and whispering) Not me, not me, not me, not me, not me!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh hey Rach!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Maybe you could take Charlie shopping.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, well...

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: I'm sure you have better things to do.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Are you kidding? Rachel loves to shop! And she has great taste! Yeah, she's the one who taught me, you don't wear white after labour day and that you always, always, always have to put on underwear when you're trying on clothes.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: If you have the time, I'd really appreciate the help.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, uh-uh... Let's-Let's shop!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Charlie) Ok, you're gonna come back with some very classy clothes... (aside to Rachel)... and some slutty lingerie, SLUTTY!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering and talking on mobile phone) Ok, great! All right, bye! (she hangs up) Pain in the ass!! (she looks at the others, then back at the phone) That's off, right?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What's the matter, Pheebs?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh... Mike's sister just invited me to a party tonight, he's gonna be there. And she was like "Oh, don't worry! I asked him. He's totally ok with seeing you!". So now I have to go so he'll think that I'm totally ok with seeing him!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Which you're not, because you've totally hung up on him!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And you're gonna want him to eat his heart out so you're gonna have to look fabulous!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (after a short pause) I didn't even think about that! (pause) Aaargh, sexual politics!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey Pheebs, I'm-I'm taking Charlie shopping, why don't you come and I'll help you find something.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok, that'll be great!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, ain't that nice? The three of you trying on slutty lingerie together.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's not what we're gonna do!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why would you ruin it, who was that hurtin'?
Opening credits
Doctor Connelly's office

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (looking at the picture of the female reproductive system) Wow! Fortunately she has a very pretty face!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I so can't believe this! My uterus is an inhospitable environment? I was trying so hard to be a good hostess!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I can't believe my sperm have low motility because, let me tell you, when I was growing up they sure seem to be in a hurry to get places!!

lines.speaker: Doctor Connelly
lines.text: (entering) Hi there.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Doctor Connelly
lines.text: I'm sorry there wasn't better news from your test last week but I wanted to talk to you about your options.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Doctor Connelly
lines.text: Above all, even though your chances of conceiving through natural means aren't great, you never know! So, keep having sex on a regular basis.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, DAMN IT!
Dr. Connelly glares at Chandler

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Don't worry, after a while he'll tune it out.

lines.speaker: Doctor Connelly
lines.text: Ok, given your situation, the options with the greatest chances for success would be surrogacy, or insemination using a sperm donor.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (long pause) Ok.

lines.speaker: Doctor Connelly
lines.text: And, of course, if you feel that neither of those is right for you, you can always adopt.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Is that a hint? Because we love you Doctor Connelly but we don't think we'd want you to be our child! (Dr. Connelly glares at him) Wow, talking about an inhospitable environment!
Central Perk. Joey and Charlie on the couch. Rachel enters

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! Ok, you're ready to go pick up Phoebe and go shopping?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Oh, yeah! Let's do it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Charlie) Alright, have a good time. (they kiss)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Not gonna find any clothes in there!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey, you guys!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Guess who's up for keynote speaker at the National Paleontology Conference?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Umh... Kurts Baley?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, right! What was last time he met a submission deadline for an abstract (he and Charlie laugh, then Joey starts laughing too without any reason) Well, why are you laughing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Just... seeing what it'd be like to be a paleontologist... it's fun, yeah!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: So you're up for keynote speaker! Who's making the decisions?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Professor Sherman, yeah. I've a meeting with him today.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: He's a pretty tough guy to impress.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, well... I think I know how to dazzle him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh... you're not gonna do a magic trick, are ya?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Tsz... NO! (he goes to sit down, dropping a multicoloured silk streamer off his sleeve).

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Hey guys!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wait a minute, you guys. Oh, I wanna ask you something. I-I I may get to speak at this paleontology convention and if I do, I'd love for you guys to come and hear me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I think I can safely say that we all have family issues, work stuff and/or are sick.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's in Barbados.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But you come first!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm there!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: We'll see you, guys! (she goes)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Bye, see ya. (she goes)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sitting down on the couch) Ok.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, so. How did it go at the fertility clinic?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Not as much fun as last time. Apparently you only get porn if you're giving a sperm sample.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So-so what did the doctor say?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well... there's surrogacy, but Monica has dreamt her whole life of carrying a child, she has felt that watching a surrogate would be... too hard for her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So you're ruling out surrogacy?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So, I don't have to learn what that means?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Aside from adoption the only other choice is insemination, so... we're talking about sperm donors.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Enough said, I'm there for you man. Where is she, upstairs?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (stopping Joey) ah-ha!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: How do you feel about all this?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I wish there was an easier way for us to have a child but I don't think there is one.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on Ross, be a good guy. Step up and do it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (puzzled) What?
Joey moves close to Ross and whispers something in his ear

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (looking astonished) What? NO! I am not going to give them Ben!
Professor Sherman's office, Ross is relating to Professor Sherman

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The data we are receiving from MRI scans and DNA testing of these fossils are - are staggering.

lines.speaker: Professor Sherman
lines.text: Mmm-mm.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (reading from a notepad) I mean, we've been accepting Leakey's dates as a given, but if they're off by even a hundred thousand years or so then you can - you can just throw most of our assumptions, you know, right in the trash. (he throws the notepad in the waste bin) So-so what I am saying is - is is that (he picks the notepad back from the waste bin) is that the repercussions could be huge! I mean, not just in palaeontology, but if-if you think about it, in evolutionary biology, uh, genetics, geology, uh, I mean, truly the mind boggles!
Turns to look at Professor Sherman, only to discover that he is sleeping

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, that's not what you want...
Shop, Rachel, Charlie and Phoebe walk in

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: (to a girl) Incentive For Men?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I'll take some of that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Pheebs, that's for men!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, I know, this way when I go to the party later Mike will know I am over him cause I'm gonna smell like another guy. (to the shop assistant) Yeah.
The shop assistant sprays the perfume on Phoebe's neck

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok. Oh good, I'm dating a Russian cab driver. (to the shop assistant). Seriously does anyone buy this? I smell like beets!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: (to Rachel) So, you know what, I really like those jackets with the shoulder pads on them. Where do you think those would be?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: On Melanie Griffith in "Working girl". I think what you want is over here.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: See, I told you I needed someone! Oh, you know, by the way, as a "thank you", I would really love to take you out.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Yeah! Actually Joey and I are going to the movies tonight, wanna come?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I can't. Because I-I've seen them.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: You've seen all the movies...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! I'm a big fan! Of the movies, you know. Motion pictures. The Talkies!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (picks up a dress) Hey Rach, will you come with me to a dressing room?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Wha, you know, maybe we can do something else!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know that depends on what it is! I've done a lot of stuff.
Phoebe and Rachel go off to the dressing rooms. They enter one and close the curtain.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So what were you doing out there, do you not like Charlie?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's ok, I just don't get a really good vibe from her!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know, you know, just the way she waltzed in here all smart, and tall! You know, and just swept Joey off his feet... I mean, nobody else has a chance!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Who else?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Anybody! You, me, you know, Monica's mom...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You like Joey?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Shhhhh! Phoebe! All right, look. I have a little thing for him.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (whispering) Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's just physical and I have it totally under control! Ok? It's just, when I see them together, sometimes I just get a little jealous!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh, wow! Isn't it ironic that he liked you and now you like him?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (annoyed) Oh, I get it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh well, as long as it is under control, you know, you can't do anything about it, he's already dating her, and she is a nice person, that wouldn't be right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know, I know, so it is just not a big deal.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So can we keep this between us?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, great, because I gotta get out of here, the smell of beets is killing me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh.
Rachel opens the curtains and sees Charlie coming out from the dressing room just next to theirs

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Any chance Charlie has a deaf twin?
Monica's apartment, Chandler walks in with a friend of his while Monica is putting fruit in a bowl.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi honey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Look I brought a friend for dinner, this is Zack, from work!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, of course, it's so nice to see you again, Zack!

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: (shaking Monica's hand) You too.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You guys haven't actually met before, but, boy! You're both polite! (pause) Go to have a seat Zack, and I'll get you a beer.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I got it.

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Mon) So, Zack's pretty nice, uh?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, I guess.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, how would you like to have a baby that's half yours and half his!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (turns around and she's quite shocked) Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, we're talking about sperm donors and Zack may be the guy! I mean, look, he's intelligent, he's healthy, he's athletic, I mean, he is "spermtastic"!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, this is crazy! What did you even say to him! "Come up, meet my wife! Give us your sperm"!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, I invited him to dinner so you could get a chance to get to know him! I mean, if we go through a sperm bank you never meet the guy, get to check him out.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm telling you, he's great! I mean, even if my sperm worked fine, I'd think he'd be the way to go!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm not going to be a part of this! You can't just bring some random guy at home and expect him to be our sperm donor!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ok!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (bringing the beer to Zack) Zack!

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: Thanks! Do you have a coaster? I don't wanna make a ring.
Monica hears that and is suddenly very interested in Zack

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Tell me about yourself, Zack!
Shop, Phoebe and Rachel are talking in front of the dressing room

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, God, do you think she heard? It would be so bad if she heard!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, maybe she didn't hear! Ok I'm gonna go into that dressing room, you stay in here and I'll talk and see if you can hear me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, great!
Phoebe moves in the dressing room from which Charlie went out

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, thank God I can't hear a word that you're saying!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (sticks her head out) I didn't say anything yet!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sticks her head out too) Well, get back in there and talk!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (goes back in) I'm Rachel. It's so annoying when I put Emma on the phone to talk with my friends.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (comes out again) What!?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (comes out too) Well, some things are just hard to say to your face.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok well, I heard that! Which means that she heard it too!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh! We have a problem.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! What are we gonna do?
A strange woman sticks her head out from a third changing cubicle to the far right

lines.speaker: Stranger
lines.text: Just be honest with her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Stranger
lines.text: And it is annoying when parents put their baby on the phone...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (yelling at the stranger) Alright! Enough out of you!
Joey's apartment. Joey is sitting on his bed and the phone rings

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey! Hey, I need to talk to Charlie. Is she there?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No. no... eh... she went shopping with Rachel. Why? What's up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm meeting with professor Sherman about my being the keynote speaker...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh! How's it going?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It could be better! He, uhm... he fell asleep!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What!? But I already bought my ticket to Bermuda!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Barbados.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Fine, I'll rent a car and drive...! Ross, you have to get that job!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What am I supposed to do? He's out cold! In fact he was just talking in his sleep before and evidently he wants someone named Fran to spank him harder.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, just wake him up!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't! If he realizes that I'm the one that put him to sleep, I won't get the job!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh! That's a tough one. Oh! Wait a minute, this happened to me before! Yeah, I was auditioning for a play and the producer fell asleep and... (pause) no wait a minute... it was me who fell asleep... Yeah I mean hey, Shakespeare, how about a chase scene once in a while!?
Chandler and Monica's apartement. Chandler and the guest are in the living room, Monica in the kitchen

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey guys! Dinner's ready!

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: Oh! I'm gonna go wash up first. (Chandler points him the bathroom) Thanks!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So what do you think? I want that guys genes for my kid! Those eyes, those cheeckbones!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok, there's enthusiastic and there's just plain gay!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You don't like him.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think he is fine! It's just that we don't know anything real about him... we should get more information.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Alright! Just follow my lead!
Zack comes out of the bathroom. They all sit down at the table.

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: You guys have such a great place here.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh! Thanks, I'm crazy about our place. Hey! speaking of crazy... do you have a history of mental illness in the family?

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: Uhm... no. Although I did have an uncle who voted for Dukakis.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (very seriously) That's really not the kind of thing we are looking for Zack.

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: (looking very puzzled) Okaaay... so eh... so tell me, how did you guys meet.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, friends first, drunk in London, you know the story. I've got a better question for you: Do you or any of your blood relatives have diabetes?

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: (after a pause, very confused) No...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Eh... Heart Disease, Alzheimers, gout?

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: You guys don't have people for dinner a lot, huh?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We're just making conversation. (Chandler makes an agreeing-sound)

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: Ok. I heard a joke today. It's pretty funny...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You know what's not funny? Male Pattern Baldness (Monica stretches her neck to look behind Zack's head and then gives Chandler an "ok" sign)

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: Ok listen, you guys have shown a lot of interest in me tonight and I'm flattered and... and quite frankly a little frightened. Can we just talk about something else?

lines.speaker: Monica & Chandler
lines.text: Sure! Alright...

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: Ravioli's delicious!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I noticed you were enjoying that Ravioli with a beautiful set of teeth. Did you have braces as a child?

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: No I didn't.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yess!! (M & C high-five and Zack looks confused again)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (Proceeding with his dinner) We're teeth people Zack!
In the store. Rachel and Phoebe returning from the changing rooms

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright! Let's just do it. Let's just go over there and see if she heard.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Good plan.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok. (Phoebe starts to walk in the opposite direction though. Rachel sees and follows her) Wha...? where? Where are you going?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! I'm sorry Rachel, I don't have time for your childish games, ok? I still have to go find something incredible to wear so I can beat Mike at "who's more over who"! (at which she walks away)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to Charlie) Hey, hi! Hey, where've you been?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Oh! trying on clothes.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (pretends to be stunned) Oh! Wi... in the dres... in the dressing room!? Well, that's so weird! Phoebe and I were just trying on clothes in the dressing room. God it's just such a small world!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: (smiling) Rachel... I heard you guys whispering.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh God. You did. You heard. Ok, listen, let me explain.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: No! There's nothing to explain. I heard you. Phoebe likes Joey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (after a pause) Yeah.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: It's just that... I don't understand it... I mean, Phoebe likes Joey and then she comes here to buy a dress to impress another guy...?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! That's Phoebe. That's Phoebe. You know, she just wants them all! It's like she's a nympho!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah...

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: You know, by the way. I heard you tell her not to do anything. Thanks for sticking up for me. You are such a nice person.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Looks ashamed) I try...
Prof. Sherman's office. Sherman is still asleep on his chair, blocking the door.
Ross takes his suitcase and tries to get out but ends up falling on Prof. Sherman's laps, thereby waking him up

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To the still half asleep Professor) Oh my God! You really want me to be the keynote speaker? Thank you! (hugs him whilst still on his lap)

lines.speaker: Prof. Sherman
lines.text: (confused) You're welcome. (Ross hugs him again)
Central Perk. Joey is sitting on the sofa, eating a cookie.
Phoebe walks in wearing a fancy, revealing dress, and stands before Joey

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (impressed) Wow! You look... (drops the cookie)... stop-eating hot! Which is like the highest level of hotness!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Are you sure? Because I'm really dreading going to this party.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Then don't go!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Mike knows I'm coming, and if I don't show up he'll think it's because of him! And I don't want to lose face! That's a very serious thing in my culture.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Alright, then you go to that party and you pretend to be over Mike. And afterward you come to my place and I'll get you good and drunk!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You got it! Ok. But not on the wine that you made, ok, because I just don't want to go back to the Emergency Room.
Joey gives Phoebe a thumbs up. Phoebe walks out
Outside Central Perk.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: David?
David the scientist guy is standing at the news-stand

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Phoebe! Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! (they hug)

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Wow, you look unbelievable.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. What-what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Well, I'm back from Minsk... permanently.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Well, remember how I was trying to achieve the positronic distillation of subatomic particles?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Well, after eight years of research I discovered that it can't be done.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, it's great that you're back! How are you?

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Good, good, life is good...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Good!

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Ah well, I-I'm seeing someone.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (disappointed) Oh, good for you.

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: She's also a scientist, so she's very smart and pretty and... well, it's actually because of you, really, that we're together, I mean, I saw what you had with that Mike guy, and I just said "Boy, I want that".

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Mike and I broke up.

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: You're kidding me. Because I'm not seeing anybody, I've just totally made that up.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Yeah, I don't know why, I'm sorry, I guess I just didn't want to lose face.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I understand. Yeah. Ok so then ok, so we're both living in New York, not seeing anyone. That's so not like us!

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Yeah, I know. Well... this is probably a stupid question, seeing that you look like that, but do you have some place that you need to be right now?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well... (pause) no.

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Do you wanna get a drink?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'd love to.

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Great.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok. (they walk away together)

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Do you smell beets?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, got it, stay upwind of me.
Charlie and Rachel arrive. They see David and Phoebe leave

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Hey, there's Phoebe! Is that Mike she's with?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, that's David.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: There's a third guy?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (disapprovingly) Tip of the iceberg.
[Cut to Monica and Chandler's]

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: I'm gonna take off now. You're gonna let me go home, aren't you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You sure you don't wanna stick around a little longer?

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: No, no, I should get home, I'm kinda tired.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you just tired now or are you always tired, 'cause that could be a sign of clinical depression.

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: No it's just tiring having to figure out the age at which all my grandparents died. I'll see you tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ok.
Zack leaves

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I think we've found our sperm!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Does seem pretty perfect.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, you think so, well? Should I ask him?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (pause) No.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why not, just because his great-grandmother was obese, our kids are gonna get that from you anyway!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, that's not it. It's just that when we were asking him all those questions before, I just... I just realized I don't care if he's the most perfect guy in the world... he's not you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, he's better!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, he's not. And if I can't get pregnant with you, then I don't want to get pregnant by... him or anyone else.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really? Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sighs with relief) Thank God, because I don't wanna do this either. You know, I was just doing because I thought that was what you wanted to do. You know, I'm the husband, I'm supposed to... bring the sperm.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That is so sweet. I love you. (they kiss)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you know this leaves us with...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Adoption.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How do you feel about that?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think I feel ok about it. Actually I think I feel really good about it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Me too. I wanna find a baby that needs a home and I wanna raise it with you. And I wanna mess it up in our own specific way.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So this is it, we're really gonna adopt?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (smiling) Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (excitedly) Oh my God, we're gonna be parents!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We are gonna be great parents.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And it could be soon. I mean, think about it: right now, somewhere out there (they go look through the window) our baby could be being conceived.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait, if we're lucky, and we're really really really quiet, we may be able to hear the sound of a condom breaking!
they hug
Closing credits
Zack's office

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, Zack!

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: (hardly enthusiastic) Hey Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, I just wanted to apologize for last night. I got the feeling we made you a little uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: No you didn't.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: No you did.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: My wife and I have some boundary issues, you know, sometimes we ask inappropriate questions. We're working on it.
Zack's pregnant secretary, Jeanette, walks in

lines.speaker: Jeanette
lines.text: (to Zack) Here are the boards for Friday's pitch (hands him something).

lines.speaker: Zack
lines.text: Oh, thank you.
Jeanette walks out

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You wouldn't know if Jeanette's planning on keeping her baby, would ya?
End
